summary: The diff implements all three requirements with good coverage. REQ-1 (fix guestbook save bug) is addressed in AddEntryPage.tsx and the backend with proper field passing. REQ-2 (edit/delete controls) is implemented in both frontend (GuestbookFeedPage, EntryDetailPage, EditEntryDialog) and backend (authorization checks). REQ-3 (hamburger menu) is implemented via new HamburgerMenu.tsx, CreateAccountDialog.tsx, HowToUseDialog.tsx, and AboutDialog.tsx, composed into AppLayout.tsx. All major acceptance criteria appear to be met.
